name: TestimonialCardOne
description: Testimonial card with image background, star rating, name, role, and company overlay.
details: Use for displaying customer testimonials with visual impact. Layout: Full Image Background → Bottom Overlay Card (Star Rating → Name → Role + Company). Card has fixed height (h-100, 2xl:h-120) with image fill. Overlay uses card styling with rounded corners. Star rating displayed at top using filled Star icons. Name, role, and company stacked vertically with tight line-height. All core fields required for visual consistency. Best for testimonial sections, reviews, or social proof displays. Automatically switches between grid (1-4 items) and carousel (5+ items). Optional header with title, description, tag, and buttons.

description.example: Real feedback from our valued customers

videoSrc.note: Video path for customer (alternative to imageSrc)

imageAlt.note: Alt text for image (defaults to customer name if not provided)

videoAriaLabel.note: Aria label for video (defaults to customer name if not provided)

propsSchema.testimonials: Array<{ id: string, name: string, role: string, company: string, rating: number, imageSrc?: string, videoSrc?: string, imageAlt?: string, videoAriaLabel?: string }>
propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.textboxLayout: 'default' | 'split' | 'split-actions' | 'split-description' | 'inline-image' (required - 'inline-image' uses titleSegments for rich text with images)
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageWrapperClassName?: string - For styling image wrapper in inline-image layout
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageClassName?: string - For styling images in inline-image layout

usageExample: <TestimonialCardOne testimonials={[{ id: '1', name: 'Alisa Hester', role: 'PM, Hourglass', company: 'Web Design Agency', rating: 5, imageSrc: '/testimonials/alisa.jpg' }]} title="What Our Customers Say" gridVariant="uniform-all-items-equal" textboxLayout="default" animationType="slide-up" useInvertedBackground={false} />
